headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -45.1)
key_insights: Fears trending up 9% over 7 days (weak momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 108 quotes and heavy strong intensity (84 strong vs 24 moderate/mild) - people are expressing anger forcefully today.

• The frustration score sits in the lower-middle range historically but well above the typical quiet days.

• Fears and optimism both worsened from yesterday, with optimism particularly subdued compared to its recent range.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
